<div id="content-container">

<span id="background-color"
class="fixed inset-0 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark -z-10 pointer-events-none"></span>

<div class="flex flex-row-reverse gap-12 box-border w-full pt-40 lg:pt-10">

<div id="content-side-layout"
class="hidden xl:flex self-start sticky xl:flex-col max-w-[28rem] z-[21] h-[calc(100vh-9.5rem)] top-[calc(9.5rem-var(--sidenav-move-up,0px))]">

<div id="table-of-contents-layout"
class="z-10 hidden xl:flex box-border max-h-full pl-10 w-[19rem]">

<div id="table-of-contents"
class="text-gray-600 text-sm leading-6 w-[16.5rem] overflow-y-auto space-y-2 pb-4 -mt-10 pt-10">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="h-3 w-3" />On this page

<div>

- <a href="lifecycle.html#lifecycle-phases"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Lifecycle
  Phases</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#initialization"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Initialization</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#version-negotiation"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:2rem">Version Negotiation</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#capability-negotiation"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:2rem">Capability Negotiation</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#operation"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Operation</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#shutdown"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:1rem">Shutdown</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#stdio"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:2rem">stdio</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#http"
  class="group flex items-start break-words py-1 whitespace-pre-wrap text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
  style="padding-left:2rem">HTTP</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#timeouts"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Timeouts</a>
- <a href="lifecycle.html#error-handling"
  class="break-words py-1 block font-medium hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Error
  Handling</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="content-area"
class="relative grow box-border flex-col w-full mx-auto px-1 lg:pl-[23.7rem] lg:-ml-12 xl:w-[calc(100%-28rem)]">

<div id="header" class="relative leading-none">

<div class="mt-0.5 space-y-2.5">

<div class="eyebrow h-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light text-sm font-semibold">

Base Protocol

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center relative gap-2 min-w-0">

# Lifecycle

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] justify-end ml-auto sm:flex hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Lifecycle"
page-href="/specification/2025-11-25/basic/lifecycle">

<div id="enable-section-numbers">

</div>

<span data-as="p">The Model Context Protocol (MCP) defines a rigorous
lifecycle for client-server connections that ensures proper capability
negotiation and state management.</span>

1.  **Initialization**: Capability negotiation and protocol version
    agreement
2.  **Operation**: Normal protocol communication
3.  **Shutdown**: Graceful termination of the connection

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#lifecycle-phases"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Lifecycle Phases</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#initialization"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Initialization</span>

<span data-as="p">The initialization phase **MUST** be the first
interaction between client and server. During this phase, the client and
server:</span>

- Establish protocol version compatibility
- Exchange and negotiate capabilities
- Share implementation details

<span data-as="p">The client **MUST** initiate this phase by sending an
`initialize` request containing:</span>

- Protocol version supported
- Client capabilities
- Client implementation information

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="42" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "protocolVersion": "2025-11-25",
    "capabilities": {
      "roots": {
        "listChanged": true
      },
      "sampling": {},
      "elicitation": {
        "form": {},
        "url": {}
      },
      "tasks": {
        "requests": {
          "elicitation": {
            "create": {}
          },
          "sampling": {
            "createMessage": {}
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "clientInfo": {
      "name": "ExampleClient",
      "title": "Example Client Display Name",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "description": "An example MCP client application",
      "icons": [
        {
          "src": "https://example.com/icon.png",
          "mimeType": "image/png",
          "sizes": ["48x48"]
        }
      ],
      "websiteUrl": "https://example.com"
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">The server **MUST** respond with its own capabilities
and information:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="44" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "result": {
    "protocolVersion": "2025-11-25",
    "capabilities": {
      "logging": {},
      "prompts": {
        "listChanged": true
      },
      "resources": {
        "subscribe": true,
        "listChanged": true
      },
      "tools": {
        "listChanged": true
      },
      "tasks": {
        "list": {},
        "cancel": {},
        "requests": {
          "tools": {
            "call": {}
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "serverInfo": {
      "name": "ExampleServer",
      "title": "Example Server Display Name",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "description": "An example MCP server providing tools and resources",
      "icons": [
        {
          "src": "https://example.com/server-icon.svg",
          "mimeType": "image/svg+xml",
          "sizes": ["any"]
        }
      ],
      "websiteUrl": "https://example.com/server"
    },
    "instructions": "Optional instructions for the client"
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">After successful initialization, the client **MUST**
send an `initialized` notification to indicate it is ready to begin
normal operations:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="4" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "method": "notifications/initialized"
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- The client **SHOULD NOT** send requests other than <a
  href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/ping"
  class="link">pings</a> before the server has responded to the
  `initialize` request.
- The server **SHOULD NOT** send requests other than <a
  href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/ping"
  class="link">pings</a> and
  <a href="../server/utilities/logging.html" class="link">logging</a>
  before receiving the `initialized` notification.

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#version-negotiation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Version Negotiation</span>

<span data-as="p">In the `initialize` request, the client **MUST** send
a protocol version it supports. This **SHOULD** be the *latest* version
supported by the client.</span> <span data-as="p">If the server supports
the requested protocol version, it **MUST** respond with the same
version. Otherwise, the server **MUST** respond with another protocol
version it supports. This **SHOULD** be the *latest* version supported
by the server.</span> <span data-as="p">If the client does not support
the version in the server’s response, it **SHOULD** disconnect.</span>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

<div class="mt-0.5 w-4" component-part="callout-icon">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

</div>

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">If using HTTP, the client **MUST** include the
`MCP-Protocol-Version: <protocol-version>` HTTP header on all subsequent
requests to the MCP server. For details, see
<a href="transports.html#protocol-version-header" class="link">the
Protocol Version Header section in Transports</a>.</span>

</div>

</div>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#capability-negotiation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Capability Negotiation</span>

<span data-as="p">Client and server capabilities establish which
optional protocol features will be available during the session.</span>
<span data-as="p">Key capabilities include:</span>

<div class="[--page-padding:20px] overflow-x-auto flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-[var(--page-padding)] max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"
table-wrapper="true">

<div class="px-[var(--page-padding)] grow max-w-none table">

| Category | Capability | Description |
|----|----|----|
| Client | `roots` | Ability to provide filesystem <a href="../../2025-11-25/client/roots.html" class="link">roots</a> |
| Client | `sampling` | Support for LLM <a href="../client/sampling.html" class="link">sampling</a> requests |
| Client | `elicitation` | Support for server <a href="../client/elicitation.html" class="link">elicitation</a> requests |
| Client | `tasks` | Support for <a
href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/tasks"
class="link">task-augmented</a> client requests |
| Client | `experimental` | Describes support for non-standard experimental features |
| Server | `prompts` | Offers <a href="../server/prompts.html" class="link">prompt templates</a> |
| Server | `resources` | Provides readable <a href="../server/resources.html" class="link">resources</a> |
| Server | `tools` | Exposes callable <a href="../server/tools.html" class="link">tools</a> |
| Server | `logging` | Emits structured <a href="../server/utilities/logging.html" class="link">log messages</a> |
| Server | `completions` | Supports argument <a
href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/server/utilities/completion"
class="link">autocompletion</a> |
| Server | `tasks` | Support for <a
href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/tasks"
class="link">task-augmented</a> server requests |
| Server | `experimental` | Describes support for non-standard experimental features |

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Capability objects can describe sub-capabilities
like:</span>

- `listChanged`: Support for list change notifications (for prompts,
  resources, and tools)
- `subscribe`: Support for subscribing to individual items’ changes
  (resources only)

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#operation"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Operation</span>

<span data-as="p">During the operation phase, the client and server
exchange messages according to the negotiated capabilities.</span>
<span data-as="p">Both parties **MUST**:</span>

- Respect the negotiated protocol version
- Only use capabilities that were successfully negotiated

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#shutdown"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Shutdown</span>

<span data-as="p">During the shutdown phase, one side (usually the
client) cleanly terminates the protocol connection. No specific shutdown
messages are defined—instead, the underlying transport mechanism should
be used to signal connection termination:</span>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#stdio"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">stdio</span>

<span data-as="p">For the stdio
<a href="transports.html" class="link">transport</a>, the client
**SHOULD** initiate shutdown by:</span>

1.  First, closing the input stream to the child process (the server)
2.  Waiting for the server to exit, or sending `SIGTERM` if the server
    does not exit within a reasonable time
3.  Sending `SIGKILL` if the server does not exit within a reasonable
    time after `SIGTERM`

<span data-as="p">The server **MAY** initiate shutdown by closing its
output stream to the client and exiting.</span>

#### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#http"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">HTTP</span>

<span data-as="p">For HTTP
<a href="transports.html" class="link">transports</a>, shutdown is
indicated by closing the associated HTTP connection(s).</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#timeouts"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Timeouts</span>

<span data-as="p">Implementations **SHOULD** establish timeouts for all
sent requests, to prevent hung connections and resource exhaustion. When
the request has not received a success or error response within the
timeout period, the sender **SHOULD** issue a <a
href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/cancellation"
class="link">cancellation notification</a> for that request and stop
waiting for a response.</span> <span data-as="p">SDKs and other
middleware **SHOULD** allow these timeouts to be configured on a
per-request basis.</span> <span data-as="p">Implementations **MAY**
choose to reset the timeout clock when receiving a <a
href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/specification/2025-11-25/basic/utilities/progress"
class="link">progress notification</a> corresponding to the request, as
this implies that work is actually happening. However, implementations
**SHOULD** always enforce a maximum timeout, regardless of progress
notifications, to limit the impact of a misbehaving client or
server.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="lifecycle.html#error-handling"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Error Handling</span>

<span data-as="p">Implementations **SHOULD** be prepared to handle these
error cases:</span>

- Protocol version mismatch
- Failure to negotiate required capabilities
- Request <a href="lifecycle.html#timeouts" class="link">timeouts</a>

<span data-as="p">Example initialization error:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="12" language="json">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "error": {
    "code": -32602,
    "message": "Unsupported protocol version",
    "data": {
      "supported": ["2024-11-05"],
      "requested": "1.0.0"
    }
  }
}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="feedback-toolbar pb-16 w-full flex flex-col gap-y-8">

<div class="flex flex-row flex-wrap gap-4 items-center justify-between">

Was this page helpful?

<div class="flex gap-3 items-center">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="fill-current" /><span class="small">Yes</span>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="fill-current" /><span class="small">No</span>

</div>

<div class="flex gap-3">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

class="px-0.5 flex items-center text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200">

class="h-1.5 stroke-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:stroke-gray-600 dark:group-hover:stroke-gray-300" /><span

aria-hidden="true">

<div class="chat-assistant-floating-input w-full group/assistant-bar relative before:content-[""] before:absolute before:left-0 before:right-0 before:top-1/2 before:h-[200px] before:bg-background-light before:dark:bg-background-dark translate-y-[100px] opacity-0">

<div class="relative pb-4 sm:pb-6">

<div class="flex flex-col w-full rounded-2xl pointer-events-auto bg-background-light/90 dark:bg-background-dark/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/30 focus-within:border-primary dark:focus-within:border-primary-light transition-colors cursor-pointer">

<div class="relative flex items-end">

<span class="absolute right-11 bottom-3 text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500 select-none pointer-events-none peer-focus/input:hidden hidden sm:inline">⌘I</span>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="lucide lucide-arrow-up text-white dark:text-white size-3.5" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex gap-6 flex-wrap">

target="_blank"><span class="sr-only">github</span><img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-5 h-5 bg-gray-400 dark:bg-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-500 dark:hover:bg-gray-400" /></a>
